summary: paulgraham.com exposes a static public essay index rather than a JSON API. The CLI models articles.html as the canonical index and layers read-only native commands over the static HTML and linked essay pages.
decisions: Use articles.html as canonical source because it lists the full essay archive.
Treat rss.html as useful corroboration but not as the primary source because RSS may not cover the full historical index.
Expose read-only native commands for latest/list/search/read/links/random so agents do not need to parse raw HTML themselves.
No authentication or mutation commands are needed.
